metadata.title: SEOLens - Free Keyword Research Tool
metadata.description: Discover search volume, keyword difficulty, CPC, and competition data for any keyword worldwide.

meta.title: Free Keyword Research Tool
meta.description: Research keywords with real-time search volume, difficulty scores, CPC data, and AI-powered suggestions.

hero.title: Keyword Research,
hero.subtitle: Just type a keyword and instantly get search volume, difficulty, CPC, and competition data. No signup, no complexity.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: A complete keyword research toolkit built for developers and SEO professionals.

searchVolume.title: Search Volume
searchVolume.description: Accurate monthly search volume data from Google Ads API with historical trends.

difficulty.title: Keyword Difficulty
difficulty.description: Real-time KD scores powered by DataForSEO to gauge ranking potential.

suggestions.title: Keyword Suggestions
suggestions.description: AI-powered keyword expansion using Google Autocomplete with alphabet crawling.

global.title: Global Coverage
global.description: Research keywords across 20 countries and 14 languages worldwide.

api.title: REST API & MCP
api.description: Programmatic access via REST API or Claude MCP integration.

cache.title: Smart Caching
cache.description: Supabase-backed cache with configurable TTLs to minimize API costs.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to keyword insights.

step1.title: Enter Keywords
step1.description: Type one or multiple keywords, select your target country and language.

step2.title: Analyze Data
step2.description: We fetch search volume, difficulty, CPC, and related suggestions in real-time.

step3.title: Export & Act
step3.description: Review results in sortable tables and use the data to optimize your content strategy.

cta.title: Ready to Research?
cta.subtitle: Start discovering keyword opportunities in seconds.

search.placeholder: Enter keywords (one per line or comma-separated)...
search.loading: Fetching data... This may take a few seconds for new keywords.

results.volumeTooltip: The average number of times this keyword is searched per month on Google. Higher volume means more potential traffic.
results.difficultyTooltip: How hard it is to rank on the first page of Google for this keyword. Lower scores are easier to rank for.
results.cpcTooltip: Cost Per Click — the average price advertisers pay when someone clicks their ad for this keyword. Higher CPC often means higher commercial value.
results.competitionTooltip: How many advertisers are bidding on this keyword. HIGH means lots of competition, LOW means fewer advertisers.

meta.title: Features
meta.description: Explore all SEOLens features: keyword research, difficulty scoring, related suggestions, global coverage, REST API, and smart caching.

features.heading: Everything You Need for
features.subtitle: SEOLens provides a comprehensive suite of keyword research tools, completely free. From search volume to difficulty analysis, get everything you need in one place.

searchVolume.title: Search Volume Data
searchVolume.description: Get accurate monthly search volume data powered by Google Keyword Planner. Understand the true demand behind every keyword to make data-driven content decisions.

difficulty.title: Keyword Difficulty Scores
difficulty.description: Instantly gauge how hard it will be to rank for any keyword. Our difficulty scores factor in competition levels, CPC data, and search intent to give you a clear picture.

suggestions.title: Related Keyword Suggestions
suggestions.description: Discover high-value keyword opportunities you might be missing. Our suggestion engine surfaces semantically related terms, long-tail variations, and question-based queries.
details: Volume and difficulty for each suggestion

global.title: 20+ Country Coverage
global.description: Research keywords in over 20 countries and 14 languages. Get localized search volume and competition data tailored to your target market.
details: US, UK, Japan, Germany, France, and more

api.title: REST API Access
api.description: Integrate keyword research directly into your tools and workflows with our simple REST API. Perfect for building custom dashboards, automating content pipelines, or powering SEO tools.

cache.title: Smart Caching
cache.description: Results are cached in Supabase for lightning-fast repeated lookups. The same keyword query returns instantly from cache, reducing API costs and improving response times.
details: Instant cache hits for repeated queries

features.cta: Ready to start your keyword research?

meta.description: SEOLens pricing plans. Start with our free plan including keyword research, difficulty scores, and API access.

pricing.heading: Simple,
pricing.subtitle: Start researching keywords for free. No credit card required.
pricing.contact: Need higher limits or custom pricing?

meta.title: Documentation
meta.description: SEOLens API documentation. Learn how to integrate keyword research into your applications with our REST API.

docs.heading: Documentation
docs.subtitle: Integrate keyword research into your applications with the SEOLens REST API. Simple, fast, and free to get started.
docs.quickStartDescription: The SEOLens API provides a single endpoint for keyword research. Send a POST request with your keyword and get back search volume, difficulty, and related suggestions.
docs.endpointDescription: Research a keyword and get search volume, difficulty, CPC, and related suggestions.
docs.apiReferenceDescription: Detailed documentation for all endpoints, parameters, and response formats.
docs.tryToolDescription: Use the interactive keyword research tool directly in your browser.

meta.title: API Reference
meta.description: Complete API reference for the SEOLens keyword research API. Endpoints, parameters, response formats, and code examples.

docsApi.heading: API Reference
docsApi.subtitle: Complete reference for the SEOLens REST API.
docsApi.authenticationDescription: All API requests require an API key. Sign in to your dashboard to create a free API key. Include it in every request via the Authorization header or x-api-key header.
docsApi.researchEndpointDescription: Research one or more keywords and retrieve search volume, difficulty, CPC data, and related keyword suggestions.
docsApi.keywordsDescription: Array of keywords (max 50). Use instead of
docsApi.countryCodeDescription: Country code (default: "US"). Options: US, JP, GB, DE, FR, CA, AU, BR, IN, KR, MX, ES, IT, NL, SE, TW, TH, VN, ID, PH
docsApi.languageCodeDescription: Language code (default: "en"). Options: en, ja, de, fr, es, pt, it, nl, ko, zh, th, vi, id, sv

errors.401: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key
errors.400: Bad Request - missing or invalid parameters
errors.429: Rate Limit Exceeded - too many requests
errors.500: Internal Server Error - please try again later

docsApi.rateLimitsDescription: The free tier is rate-limited to ensure fair usage for all users.
rateLimitItems: 100 requests per day per IP address
Cached results do not count against the rate limit

meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.description: SEOLens privacy policy. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your data.

privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: SEOLens ("we", "our", or "us") operates the seolens.dev website and API. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our service.
privacy.usageDataDescription: We automatically collect certain information when you visit or use our service, including your IP address, browser type, operating system, referring URLs, pages viewed, and the dates and times of your visits. This data is used for analytics and to improve the service.
privacy.searchQueriesDescription: Keywords you research through our tool or API are processed to provide results. We may cache keyword results to improve performance for all users. Cached keyword data is not linked to individual users.
privacy.cookiesDescription: We use essential cookies for locale preferences and basic site functionality. We do not use third-party advertising cookies or tracking pixels.
howWeUseItems: To provide and maintain our keyword research service
To improve, personalize, and expand our service
To understand and analyze usage patterns and trends
To detect, prevent, and address technical issues or abuse
To enforce rate limits and ensure fair usage of the API
privacy.dataRetentionIntro: We retain usage data for a limited period necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy. Specifically:
dataRetentionItems: Cached keyword results are retained for up to 30 days to improve performance
Server logs (including IP addresses) are retained for up to 90 days
Aggregated analytics data (non-personally identifiable) may be retained indefinitely
privacy.thirdPartyIntro: We use the following third-party services to operate SEOLens:
privacy.contactDescription: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at:

meta.title: Terms of Service
meta.description: SEOLens terms of service. Read the terms and conditions for using our keyword research tool and API.

terms.heading: Terms of Service
terms.acceptanceDescription: By accessing or using SEOLens (the "Service"), available at seolens.dev, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to all of these Terms, do not use the Service. We reserve the right to update these Terms at any time. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the modified Terms.
terms.serviceDescriptionIntro: SEOLens provides a free keyword research tool and REST API that allows users to:
serviceDescriptionItems: Research keyword search volume, competition, and CPC data
Assess keyword difficulty for SEO purposes
Access keyword data programmatically via the REST API
terms.serviceDescriptionDisclaimer: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied.
terms.acceptableUseIntro: You agree not to use the Service to:
acceptableUseItems: Overload, disable, or impair the Service infrastructure
Circumvent rate limits or abuse the API
Scrape or resell data obtained from the Service
Use automated tools to excessively access the Service beyond documented API endpoints
Violate any applicable laws or regulations
terms.limitationsIntro: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, SEOLens and its operators shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits or revenues, whether incurred directly or indirectly, or any loss of data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses resulting from:
limitationsItems: Your use of or inability to use the Service
Any inaccuracies in keyword data, search volumes, or difficulty scores
Any interruption, suspension, or termination of the Service
Any bugs, viruses, or errors transmitted through the Service
terms.dataAccuracyDescription: Keyword data, including search volumes, CPC ranges, and difficulty scores, is sourced from third-party providers and is provided for informational purposes only. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of this data. SEO decisions should be made using multiple data sources and professional judgment.
terms.changesDescription: We reserve the right to modify or replace these Terms at any time. If a revision is material, we will provide at least 30 days notice prior to any new terms taking effect by posting a notice on the Service. What constitutes a material change will be determined at our sole discretion. Your continued use of the Service after such modifications constitutes your acceptance of the updated Terms.
terms.contactDescription: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at:

auth.subtitle: Sign in to manage your API keys
auth.checkEmail: Check your email for the confirmation link.

dashboard.title: API Keys
dashboard.freeLimit: Free tier: 100 requests per day per key.
dashboard.noKeys: No API keys yet. Create one to get started.
dashboard.saveWarning: Save this key now. It will not be shown again.
dashboard.docsParams: Parameters: keywords (string[], required, max 50), countryCode (string, default: "US"), languageCode (string, default: "en"). Supported countries: US, JP, GB, DE, FR, CA, AU, BR, IN, KR, MX, ES, IT, NL, SE, TW, TH, VN, ID, PH.
